race.comment: THE DEPUTY (5) was not disgraced in city class last time at Doomben and missed a whisker here prior in stronger than this. Comes back home and is reunited with 2x winning 2kg apprentice Rob Thorburn. Can race forward and expect a bold showing. THAT'S AN EXTRA (6) ran below her best when tenth last start over 1200m at Eagle Farm. His form at that level prior stacks up and he has a key gear chance. Maps well and should be right in it. KORUTO (1) has been in the market at his last couple of runs but failed to threaten. Come back plenty in grade and has been freshened up. Has the ability and has to be kept onside. BIG BOY GEORGE (3) peaks and can get some of the cash if he puts his best foot forward. SATAY CHICKEN (4) will get a soft run and should be around the mark.
